tech_debt_summary.notes: 31 open V1.48/V1.47 carry-forward; legacy residuals in archived/residuals/.

2026-06-13-v1.45-hygiene-and-closeout.title: cli-spec.md §6.2D/E body still references shipped V1.33-V1.44 subcommand table; needs to be rewritten to match the new Shipped Master (creator-run-preset-entry.md). Tracked for follow-up spec-hygiene pass.

2026-06-14-v1.46-author-desk-status-ux.title: capture_findings_output test helper duplicates print_findings_summary formatting logic
2026-06-14-v1.46-author-desk-status-ux.note: Pre-existing pattern worsened by V1.46 P0; future refactor should extract pure fn format_findings_summary(result, work_id) -> String shared between production and tests.

2026-06-14-v1.46-author-desk-status-ux.title: enrich_status_json tests use minimal finding_json helper; full element shape fidelity not asserted
2026-06-14-v1.46-author-desk-status-ux.note: Production path is direct to_vec() passthrough so no behavioral risk; this is test-coverage hygiene to harden the 'verbatim fidelity' claim. Fold into R-V146P0-QC1-S2 refactor when addressed.

2026-06-14-v1.46-author-desk-status-ux.title: JSON-path findings/stale degradation paths lack tracing observability
2026-06-14-v1.46-author-desk-status-ux.note: Best-effort degradation is intentional; add tracing::debug! / tracing::warn! with endpoint + work_id + elapsed_ms so operators can diagnose daemon degradation without changing user-facing contract.

2026-06-14-v1.46-author-desk-status-ux.title: Consider skipping stale fetch when findings fetch already failed
2026-06-14-v1.46-author-desk-status-ux.note: Low-confidence perf micro-opt under daemon overload. Skip stale call when findings unavailable to further reduce hot-path overhead.

2026-06-14-v1.46-novel-runtime-ux-edges.title: Manifest description text rendered verbatim without sanitize_for_terminal in format_preset_run_help
2026-06-14-v1.46-novel-runtime-ux-edges.source: qc2 (security/correctness) Warning (qc2 marked Approve per seat-level judgment: low practical risk)
2026-06-14-v1.46-novel-runtime-ux-edges.note: Defense-in-depth consistency with T1 (which uses sanitize_for_terminal for chapter-hint copy). Local user-controlled preset YAML only; no remote/untrusted input path. Apply same sanitization as T1.

2026-06-14-v1.46-novel-runtime-ux-edges.title: std::process::exit(0) in library module (maybe_print_preset_run_help_and_exit)
2026-06-14-v1.46-novel-runtime-ux-edges.note: Mitigated by extracted pure helpers + e2e tests. Low priority; pre-existing pattern in CLI binaries.

2026-06-14-v1.46-novel-runtime-ux-edges.title: Config-resolution dedup opportunity (operational_workspace_dir_from_config helper extracted but callers still ad-hoc)
2026-06-14-v1.46-novel-runtime-ux-edges.note: Pre-existing pattern; P2 added a new pure helper but didn't sweep existing callers. Out of P2 scope.

2026-06-14-v1.46-novel-runtime-ux-edges.title: T2 help-intercept exit path should flush stdout before std::process::exit(0)
2026-06-14-v1.46-novel-runtime-ux-edges.note: Line-buffered terminals typically flush on newline; low practical risk. Add explicit `use std::io::Write; let _ = std::io::stdout().flush();` before exit.

2026-06-14-v1.46-novel-runtime-ux-edges.title: CapabilityRegistry::with_builtins() rebuilt on every help intercept
2026-06-14-v1.46-novel-runtime-ux-edges.note: Negligible today; future scalability. Consider `once_cell::sync::Lazy` static registry when registry becomes expensive.

2026-06-14-v1.46-pool-observability.title: Only promote_to_active has tracing assertion in T3 capture test (other 8 paths untested)
2026-06-14-v1.46-pool-observability.note: Acceptable per plan §4.1 'test or manual note'. Parametrize for the other 8 paths as future hygiene.

2026-06-14-v1.46-pool-observability.title: Verbose UFCS subscriber construction in T3 capture test
2026-06-14-v1.46-pool-observability.note: Idiomatic registry().with(layer) preferred over the UFCS form.

2026-06-14-v1.46-pool-observability.title: Expand trace coverage beyond promote_to_active (only 1 of 9 mutation paths has capture test)
2026-06-14-v1.46-pool-observability.note: Add capture tests for the other 8 mutation paths (4 pool + 4 inspiration) as future hygiene.

2026-06-14-v1.46-pool-observability.title: Document expected INFO level intent in module-level doc for the 9 tracing::info! sites
2026-06-14-v1.46-pool-observability.note: Audit docs are present per T1; add a one-line note explaining the INFO level choice (vs DEBUG) for operator visibility.

2026-06-14-v1.46-research-auto-chain-e2e.title: preset_version = 2 magic number duplicated across test assertion and seed SQL
2026-06-14-v1.46-research-auto-chain-e2e.note: Coupling enforced only by author discipline. Consider exporting the version constant from the preset loader.

2026-06-14-v1.46-research-auto-chain-e2e.title: Raw SQL fixture duplicates schema knowledge (insert_research_schedule)
2026-06-14-v1.46-research-auto-chain-e2e.note: Hardcoded column order. Wrap in DAO-style helper or reuse auto_chain::insert_driver_schedule with preset_id parameter. At minimum, add migration-file reference comment.

2026-06-14-v1.46-research-auto-chain-e2e.title: schedule_status helper panics on missing row (fetch_one(...).unwrap())
2026-06-14-v1.46-research-auto-chain-e2e.note: Return Option<String> and let caller expect() with descriptive message, or use fetch_optional + unwrap_or_else.
